title: Manual Battle Mode

movement.title: Choose Movement
movement.mapSelect: Select a tile on the map to move

defeatEscape.title: Imminent Defeat!
defeatEscape.message: You are about to lose. Will you attempt to escape?
defeatEscape.sealEscape: Use Command Seal (Guaranteed Escape) — Stat Penalty

forcedBridge.title: Forced Assembly!
forcedBridge.message: From Day 7 onwards, all Servants are forcibly summoned to Fuyuki Bridge. Escape is impossible.

enemyEscaped.title: Enemy Escaped!
enemyEscaped.sealMessage: {{name}} used a Command Seal to successfully escape!

counterSeal.title: Enemy Master's Command Seal!
counterSeal.message: The enemy Master is about to use a Command Seal... Will you counter with yours?

area.leyline: Ley Line — Caster Territory Creation bonus

log.antiMagic: {{name}}'s Magic Resistance blocked the magic attack
log.specialAttack: True Name Release — {{np}}! Special attack against {{target}}!
log.sealEscape: {{name}} used a Command Seal to escape!
log.madDisobey: {{name}}'s Mad Enhancement activates! Acts as {{overriddenIntent}} instead of {{originalIntent}}
log.madDisobeyClass: {{class}}'s Mad Enhancement activates! Acts as {{overriddenIntent}} instead of {{originalIntent}}
log.aiCombatDistant: Magical disturbance detected in the distance...
log.independentAction: {{name}} persists through Independent Action for {{days}} days
log.gameOver: Holy Grail War concluded — {{winner}} is victorious

sealBoost: {{name}}'s Master used a Command Seal to boost combat power!
npFullPower: {{name}}'s Master deployed Noble Phantasm '{{np}}' with a Command Seal!
startTRPGDesc: Make strategic choices and join the Holy Grail War directly

tips.title: Battle Guide
tips.npDeploy: NP Deploy: Uses Command Seal, combat bonus based on NP rank (C=+10%, A=+17.5%, EX=+20%)
tips.specialAttack: Special Attack: Auto-triggers based on enemy traits (win rate +7.5~22.5%)
tips.escape: Escape: Based on AGI/LCK difference, Riding/Presence Concealment bonus (base 50%)
tips.noEscapeDay7: Day 7+: No escape allowed, all servants gather at Fuyuki Bridge
tips.ambush: Assassin Ambush: When hunting, ambush chance based on Presence Concealment (+20% if success)
tips.antiMagic: Magic Resistance: Saber/Lancer/Archer get bonus vs Caster
tips.territory: Territory Creation: Combat bonus after 2+ turns on same tile
